## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests (if backend changed)
- [ ] Frontend type-check/build/tests (if frontend changed)
- [ ] Manual verification done

## Checklist

- [ ] I used a focused scope (single logical change)
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
- [ ] I kept user-facing claims verifiable
